overview.description: Prague-based AI consultancy and training company offering custom AI implementation and workshops
overview.description_long: MIND 4 FLOW (formerly Jacurso Corp s.r.o., rebranded June 2025) provides AI consulting and training for Czech businesses. Services span custom AI development (process automation, chatbots/agents, predictive analytics, custom LLM models) and professional AI training at various price points. The company also sells pre-built AI tools via an online product inventory covering real estate visualization, contract analysis, floor plan generation, and marketing content creation.

history.origin_story: Originally incorporated as Jacurso Corp s.r.o. in November 2022; rebranded to MIND 4 FLOW s.r.o. in June 2025 when Ondřej Pecival became sole owner and director.

key_milestones.event: Company incorporated as Jacurso Corp s.r.o. in Prague
Rebranded to MIND 4 FLOW s.r.o.; Ondřej Pecival takes over as sole owner and director (June 2025)

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: MIND 4 FLOW is an AI consultancy and training boutique with no proprietary data, models, or technology moat. Their pre-built tools are thin wrappers on foundation model APIs (image gen, document Q&A, floor plan visualization), all of which are being commoditized rapidly by native platform features and competing micro-consultancies.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: AI consulting and training is a real and growing market in Central Europe, but is extremely crowded with low barriers to entry. The company's small scale and recent rebranding (June 2025) suggest early-stage traction with no clear differentiation beyond local Czech market presence.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Bootstrapped with registered capital of only 20,000 CZK, no known external investment, and a single sole owner/director. No runway signals beyond selling consulting services and one-time tool licenses at 35,000–120,000 CZK per product.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: A very small, recently rebranded sole-owner consultancy with no proprietary tech moat, no known funding, and high dependence on the generative AI hype cycle. Highly vulnerable to commoditization and competition from larger AI consultancies and platform-native tooling.

metadata.notes: Company was originally incorporated as Jacurso Corp s.r.o. (IČO: 17743923) in November 2022 and rebranded to MIND 4 FLOW s.r.o. in June 2025. Sole director and 100% owner is Ondřej Pecival. Registered capital: 20,000 CZK. Address: Školská 689/20, Praha 1. Contact: info@mind4flow.cz, +420 774 156 992. Has a product inventory at inventar.mind4flow.cz with 6 AI tools priced from 35,000 to 120,000 CZK.
